title: Run 17: full reasoning-trace transparency (no black box)
description: Inherits the proven Run 16 multi-agent loop (3 atoms -> 3 candidate merges -> verify -> cross-check -> MAIN 4-gate filter) and adds ONE thing: a REASONING_TRACE block before/around every decision, so the entire middle process is visible and verifiable. AGENT 5 is repurposed from search-quality scorer to a NEW reasoning-auditor that reads every reasoning_trace from AGENT 1-4 and flags any step where the decision does not follow from the inputs+reasoning (a logic break). The key deliverable is the REASONING_TRANSPARENCY_REPORT: a single human-readable end-to-end trace. GOAL = transparency of reasoning, NOT the niche outcome (R12).

field_meaning.inputs_seen: the exact inputs this step received, verbatim
field_meaning.reasoning: the actual reasoning: why this choice, what alternatives were considered
field_meaning.could_be_wrong_if: what would make this decision wrong

reasoning_trace_schema.rule: R9: EVERY decision (atom choice, merge, reformulation, crosscheck, every gate, hallucination, verdict) carries a reasoning_trace. No step is a black box.

agents.trace: per atom: why this atom, why this domain, what the search returned verbatim, why kept vs discarded
per merge: what mechanism transfer was attempted, why, what made it non-trivial vs a surface analogy
per reformulation: why this query phrasing, what it probed, what came back verbatim, why collision/no-collision
why these re-search queries, how they differ from AGENT 3's, why confirm/dispute each verdict
NEW ROLE: read ALL reasoning_traces from AGENT 1-4; for each, audit logical validity, decision-follows-from-inputs, gaps/leaps/unsupported claims; flag any step where reasoning != decision

merge_schema.primary_quote: verbatim >=30-char substring of atom_a or atom_b text

gates.gate_3_source: verify (collision) XOR-fused with crosscheck (mismatch): pass = >=5 reformulations AND no verifier collision AND not overturned by crosschecker
gates.gate_4: Belinda strict: mechanism causal verb present AND primary_quote is a real >=30-char verbatim substring of its named atom AND not a bare 'combine'

audit_checks.completeness: all 6 reasoning_trace fields present and non-empty
audit_checks.confidence_wellformed: confidence has a level (high|medium|low) AND a rationale
audit_checks.falsifiability: could_be_wrong_if is non-empty and not a null-statement
audit_checks.inputs_grounding: decision shares content vocabulary with inputs_seen+reasoning (records overlap; low overlap => possible leap)
audit_checks.overconfidence: confidence=high while reasoning/could_be_wrong_if contain hedge words => flag
audit_checks.decision_data_consistency: where a trace's decision restates a structured fact recorded elsewhere (collision_found, quote_verified_substring, gate pass), the trace must AGREE with the data; disagreement = LOGIC BREAK

hard_rules.R1: agents SEQUENTIAL, each commits+pushes before next (branch claude/run-17)
hard_rules.R2: push after every agent; if push fails -> STOP+report
hard_rules.R4: force raw JSON from Opus, 1 retry
hard_rules.R5: record ONLY web_search results actually seen -- never fabricate
hard_rules.R7: AGENT 4 re-verifies AGENT 3; AGENT 5 audits ALL reasoning logic
hard_rules.R9: EVERY decision has a reasoning_trace -- no step is a black box
hard_rules.R10: AGENT 5 must flag any step where decision doesn't follow from reasoning
hard_rules.R11: if session long -> commit partial + report
hard_rules.R12: goal = transparency of reasoning, not niche outcome; report the full middle process honestly whichever way the verdict goes
